chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-864 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of MA 3891/11 20.12.2017. Mr. Muhammad Dilshad, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. By means of this petition, the petitioner is seeking appointment as Naib Qasid / Chowkidar in the Education Department on the ground that his father donated a plot admeasuring 14000/- sq. ft. for the construction of building of Government Middle School Sarang Dahri free of cost. 2. Learned Counsel for the petitioner is absent and on his behalf Mr. Muhammad Dilshad, Advocate, is holding brief. 3. This issue has already been decided by the Honourable Supreme Court in the case of Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper etc (Civil Appeals Nos.19-K to 50-K of 2015) that on the basis of donation of the plot a person cannot be appointed on any post ignoring the merits. We have also decided this issue on the same line in previous petitions bearing C.Ps No.D-968 and 1274 of 2012 on 18.10.2017. In view of above, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
